title: submission file shape
content: Can anyyou tell what will be the submission.csv file shape?

comments.content:
@mahboobbiswas

Currently , on public , the size was ( 14151 rows , 2 columns ) but on private it will vary , so just make sure you deliver the correct and robust structure .
sure: https://www.kaggle.com/competitions/rogii-wellbore-geology-prediction/data It is a code submission but your code will provide a csv as described and exemplified in the above link.
